## Checklist

- [ ] **What/why is clear** — the description above explains the change and its motivation.
- [ ] **Tests pass** — `bash tests/validate-plugin.sh` exits 0 locally.
- [ ] **Follows conventions** — matches existing structure, naming, and the canonical crew/command facts.
- [ ] **No secrets** — no tokens, keys, or credentials committed; logs in this PR are scrubbed.
- [ ] **Docs updated** — README / command help / `CHANGELOG.md` updated if behavior changed.
- [ ] **Gate respected** — no new path performs an irreversible outward action without the hard gate.
